title: Senior Financial Analyst - HDFC Securities Digital Technologies - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - HDFC Securities Digital Technologies - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with HDFC Securities Digital Technologies! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Bhopal team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About HDFC Securities Digital Technologies:
HDFC Securities Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Securities Digital Technologies!
